/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/test/test_smft_em_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/SMFTEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/SMFTPipelineFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/SMFTBufferManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/SMFTCompute.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/SMFTDescriptorManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_smft_em_integration.dir/src/DiracEvolution.cpp.o -o bin/test_smft_em_integration  libNova.a libPhysics.a libimgui.a /lib/libvulkan.so -lfftw3f /lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.60
